candidateContexts.label: ts-admin-order-service admin order facade with trainnumber-prefix routing to ts-order-service or ts-order-other-service
ts-admin-route-service admin route facade with station-existence precheck against ts-station-service

candidateCovers.label: role-gated admin CRUD facade services sharing hasRole-ADMIN authority pattern and downstream Response-status branching

notes: the trainnumber prefix G or D selects the ts-order-service branch across delete/update/add order
the branch taken when start or end station is absent from the request stationList returns immediately without any downstream call
the branch taken when a station id map entry is null selects the station-not-found accumulation path
only the bootstrap application class was in scope; no controller/service files for this service were in this chunk

privateUnavailableNotes: ts-admin-travel-service chunk row only included the bootstrap application class; its controller/service/config files were not part of this chunk so the service's capability and authority surface could not be surveyed from this chunk alone
